title: Penguin upgrades
description: This mod adds penguins to Minecraft and uses them to upgrade gear and equipment.
body: This mod adds cute penguins to Minecraft where they can be found on the forest.  Watch these little guys waddle along, adorable!  Pick three up to craft yourself a  penguin upgrader.  Use this to upgrade your gear and equipment such as bows which shoot penguins.  Penguins galore!  Yay! In the future the penguin upgrader will add more upgrades to existing items.
